results.title: Irish Dairy Sector Shifts Focus to High-Value Protein Products
results.description: Ireland's dairy industry is transitioning from bulk commodities to high-value protein products amid easing commodity prices. The shift is aimed at maintaining margins by focusing on specialized nutrition and premium snacking.

results.title: DCPS' high school lunch price to increase
results.description: High school students in Daviess County Public Schools that don't qualify for free or reduced lunches will see a 50-cent increase in the cost of lunches during the 2026-27 school year.

results.title: Dear Annie: It’s been 6 years since our daughter has talked to us. We’re at our wits’ end
results.description: The daughter has been diagnosed with mental health issues, but refused to take any medication.

results.title: Saratoga barn fire kills at least 17 racehorses
results.description: Just weeks before the start of the famed thoroughbred racing season in Saratoga, a fire tore through a barn there, killing at least 17 horses. Tom Hanson reports.

results.title: KBZK Bozeman Area Weather: Mostly sunny and warm, but not as windy on Wednesday
results.description: Southwest Montana had plenty of wind gusts of 35-50 mph on Tuesday as a cold front advanced toward our area. We can expect a weakening of that wind overnight, but it will still be gusty on Wednesday.

results.title: Tucson fugitive faces charges in woman's death
results.description: Coral Michelle Smith, 40, who had been a fugitive for several days, was arrested Monday.

results.description: A new conversion camper from a South African company offers a way to trick out a Toyota Land Cruiser, turning it into a true overlander adventure machine.

results.title: Planning Commission advances stricter data center ordinance to City Council
results.description: MURRAY — After revising a proposed data center ordinance to incorporate concerns raised during last week’s packed public hearing, the Murray Planning Commission unanimously voted Tuesday to recommend the measure to the Murray City Council for further consideration.

results.title: State Supreme Court candidates return $37K to donors with primary vote unnecessary | Washington
results.description: (The Center Square) – Two judges vying for an open Washington Supreme Court seat refunded donors roughly $37,000 after the race advanced to November without the need for an August primary vote, state records show. results.title: In response to advocates, supervisors agree to review authority over detention centers
results.description: In response to repeated pleas from residents and advocates, the Kern County Board of Supervisors agreed to review and clarify the county's authority when it comes to the several immigration detention centers in the county.
